greeting.tasksToday: {count, plural, one {# task due today} other {# tasks due today}}
greeting.welcome: Welcome back — here's your farm today.

clauses.title: ISO 27001:2022 Clause Tracker
clauses.subtitle: Track your progress through clauses 4–10. All descriptions below are original paraphrases, not ISO text.
clauses.selectClause: Select a clause to view details

assets.title: Farm Assets
assets.listDescription: Every machine, vehicle, building, and piece of equipment on the farm — tracked, owned, and linked to its risks.
assets.name: Name
assets.controlsNote: Tag controls related to this asset for traceability.

risks.title: Risk Register
risks.listDescription: The single register of business risk — track, treat, and evidence.

controls.title: Practices & Controls
controls.listDescription: Every control mapped to its requirements and evidence.
controls.name: Control Name
controls.assetsNote: Tag assets protected by this control for traceability.
controls.justificationPlaceholder: Explain why this control does not apply to your organization...
controls.justificationRequired: Justification is required when marking a control as Not Applicable

evidence.title: Records
evidence.listDescription: Proof for every control — collected, reviewed, and audit-ready.

policies.title: Policy Management
policies.listDescription: Authored, approved, and acknowledged — your live policy library.
policies.selectPolicy: Select a policy to view details

audits.title: Inspections
audits.listDescription: Cycles, packs, and findings — the audit trail your assessors will see.
audits.selectAudit: Select an audit to view details

findings.title: Nonconformity Register
findings.listDescription: Issues raised in audit and assessment — owned, dated, closed.
findings.selectFinding: Select a finding to view details

mapping.title: Scheme Mapping
mapping.subtitle: Cross-framework readiness view. All descriptions are original paraphrases.

admin.title: Administration
admin.templateDescription: Available policy templates to quick-start your compliance documentation.

riskManager.title: Risks
riskManager.startScratchDesc: Create a custom risk with your own title, description, and scoring.
riskManager.useTemplateDesc: Start from a pre-built risk template with recommended scoring.
riskManager.noTemplates: No templates available. Try creating from scratch.
riskManager.noPermission: You don't have permission to create risks.
riskManager.csvDesc: Upload a CSV file with at minimum a title column. Optional columns: description, category, likelihood (1-5), impact (1-5), owner.
riskManager.noValidRows: No valid rows found. Ensure CSV has a "title" column header.
riskManager.noImportPermission: You don't have permission to import risks.
riskManager.noControlsAvailable: No controls available. Add controls first from the Controls page.

fileUpload.errorImages: File type not supported (.png or .jpg only)
fileUpload.errorDocuments: File type not supported (document files only)
fileUpload.errorProgramResourceImages: File type not supported (.svg, .png, .jpg, or .webp only)
fileUpload.errorProgramResourceFiles: File type not supported (document or zip files only)
fileUpload.errorEvidence: File type not supported — use PDF, Office, CSV, image, JSON, or ZIP

fileDropzone.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop {target} or click to browse

timeSeriesChart.emptyState: No data available for this range.

sankeyChart.emptyNodesNoLinks: Nodes are present but no cross-tier mapping flows have been recorded yet.

riskHeatmap.title: Risk Heatmap
riskHeatmap.cellTitle: L{likelihood} × I{impact} = {score} — {count, plural, one {# risk} other {# risks}}

ganttTimeline.emptyMessage: No timeline events in this range.

frameworkBuilder.title: Builder — reorder mode
frameworkBuilder.description: Drag the handle on any row to reorder. Changes are saved per-tenant — the framework stays unchanged for everyone else.

versionDiff.emptyState: Add a second version to enable comparison.
versionDiff.pickTwoDifferent: Pick two different versions to see a diff.
versionDiff.emptyDiff: No textual changes between v{from} and v{to}.

approvalBanner.selfApproval: You can’t approve your own request — another reviewer must decide.
approvalBanner.addCommentAria: Add a comment with your decision
approvalBanner.cannotApproveTitle: Reviewers cannot approve their own request
approvalBanner.cannotRejectTitle: Reviewers cannot reject their own request

truncationBanner.refineFilters: Refine your filters to narrow the view and see the rest.

aiAssistRail.intro: Let AI surface candidate risks from your asset inventory — each one scored, with a rationale and suggested controls.

widgetPicker.kpiTileDescription: Single number with label and optional sparkline.
widgetPicker.trendChartDescription: Time-series area or bar chart over a window.
widgetPicker.tenantCoverageDescription: Per-tenant coverage list with drill-down rows.
widgetPicker.drilldownCtasDescription: Navigation cards into controls / risks / evidence.
widgetPicker.modalDescription: Pick a widget type and a data variant. You can rearrange and resize after it lands.
widgetPicker.widgetTypeDescription: What kind of visualization do you want?
widgetPicker.dataSourceTrendDescription: Which metric should the chart track?
widgetPicker.dataSourceDefaultDescription: Which slice of org data should this widget show?
widgetPicker.formatDescription: How the headline number is rendered.
widgetPicker.windowDaysDescription: History length for the trend chart. Min 7, max 365.
widgetPicker.sortByDescription: How tenants are ordered in the list.
widgetPicker.titleDescription: Leave blank to use the default title for this variant.
widgetPicker.createError: Could not create widget. Please retry.

modal.discardDescription: Your unsaved changes will be lost.

stepWizard.savedOffline: Saved offline — it’ll sync when you’re back online.

table.bulkDeleteDescription: This removes the selected {noun} from your workspace. This can’t be undone.

manualTrigger.dryRunMatches: Dry run: filter MATCHES — would fire.
manualTrigger.dryRunNoMatch: Dry run: filter does NOT match — would skip.
manualTrigger.fired: Fired — a manual execution was enqueued.

canvasCommandPalette.title: Canvas commands
canvasCommandPalette.description: Every canvas action — undo, redo, save, alignment, grouping, snap toggle. Use arrow keys to navigate and Enter to run.

automationInspector.unsynced: Save the canvas to link this node to a rule, then configure it here.
automationInspector.conditionFilter: Condition filter: {state}. Edit the full filter in the rule builder.

canvasHistory.title: Version history
canvasHistory.emptyVersions: No versions yet. Save the canvas to capture the first snapshot.
canvasHistory.restoreConfirm: Restore to v{version}? The current state will be preserved as part of the history.

canvasDiff.title: Diff v{target} vs v{current}
canvasDiff.description: Comparing the snapshot to the current canvas state

processCanvas.emptyDragHint: Drag a process step from the palette to begin.

processInspector.label: Label
processInspector.subtitle: Subtitle
processInspector.saveHint: Click off the field or press Enter to save the edit.
processInspector.auditorsSeeControl: Auditors see the chosen control as a shield pill on the connection.

ruleBuilder.eventFieldsHint: This event has no filterable fields — the rule fires on every occurrence.
ruleBuilder.setOperatorsHint: Set operators (any of / none of) take a comma-separated value set. Numeric fields support greater/less than.
ruleBuilder.updateStatusHint: Move an entity to a status
ruleBuilder.slaDescription: Optional. If an execution runs past this many minutes it's flagged as breached.
ruleBuilder.chainDescription: Optional. After this rule succeeds, fire another rule.

reject.self: A step can't connect to itself.
reject.annotation: Annotations don't carry the flow — they sit beside it.

persistedCanvas.scTab: Tab — create a connected sibling node
persistedCanvas.cmdDuplicateDesc: Clone the current graph into a new map
persistedCanvas.cmdNewAutomationDesc: Start a visual rule editor (automation) canvas
persistedCanvas.cmdArrangeLrDesc: Auto-layout the canvas with a left-to-right flow
persistedCanvas.cmdArrangeTbDesc: Auto-layout the canvas with a top-to-bottom flow
persistedCanvas.cmdArrangeSelLrDesc: Auto-layout only the selected nodes — left-to-right
persistedCanvas.cmdArrangeSelTbDesc: Auto-layout only the selected nodes — top-to-bottom
persistedCanvas.cmdForceDesc: Auto-layout the canvas as an organic spring-simulated graph
persistedCanvas.cmdForceSelDesc: Apply force-directed layout to only the selected nodes
persistedCanvas.groupDesc: Wrap the selected nodes in a group container
persistedCanvas.ungroupDesc: Dissolve the selected group + lift children
persistedCanvas.cmdDeleteDesc: Remove every selected node + its edges
persistedCanvas.groupDisabledTitle: Can't nest groups or fold a node already inside a group
persistedCanvas.dragToBegin: Drag a process step from the palette to begin
persistedCanvas.emptyTitle: Map a business or IT process.
persistedCanvas.emptyBody: Capture the steps, mark the controls between them, and annotate the risks and assets each step touches.

ai.disclaimer: AI suggestion — verify with an agronomist.

parcelSheet.scanHint: Scan to open this field on a phone — pin it by the gate or in the cab.

controlExceptions.title: Control Exceptions
controlExceptions.empty: No exceptions on file. The control is enforced as designed.
controlExceptions.justificationPlaceholder: Explain why this control cannot be implemented as designed.
controlExceptions.compensatingPlaceholder: Pick a control that mitigates this gap
controlExceptions.approveNotePlaceholder: Conditions or scope of the approval
controlExceptions.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Why is this exception being rejected?
controlExceptions.renewBodyState: state with the same justification + compensating control as this one. The original record is preserved as part of the audit trail. An admin will need to approve the renewal before it takes effect.

testDashboard.noCompletedRuns: No completed runs in this period yet.
testDashboard.noScheduledPlans: No scheduled plans yet. Schedule a plan from its detail page.
testDashboard.allOnTrack: All scheduled plans are on track.

testSchedule.cadenceOffDesc: Test runs are created on demand. No auto-schedule.
testSchedule.cadenceDailyDesc: Runs every day at 09:00 in your local timezone.
testSchedule.cadenceMonthlyDesc: Runs the first of every month at 09:00.
testSchedule.cadenceQuarterlyDesc: Runs on the first of each calendar quarter at 09:00.
testSchedule.customWarning: This plan has a custom schedule that doesn't match the standard cadences. Choosing a cadence above will overwrite it.
testSchedule.clickSave: Click save to apply the new schedule.
testSchedule.noPermission: You don't have permission to change this plan's schedule.

testPlans.title: Test Plans
testPlans.noPlans: No test plans configured for this control.

pestSuggestion.fieldCaveat: Field photos are noisier than lab images — treat low-confidence results with extra caution.

automationSuggestions.intro: Automations that would close gaps in your current posture — each scored, with a rationale. Create one as a draft, then refine it.
automationSuggestions.noSuggestions: No new suggestions — your enabled rules already cover the obvious gaps.

commandPalette.title: Command palette

commandPalette.placeholder: Search controls, risks, policies, evidence, frameworks…

notificationsBell.allClearDesc: You're caught up. New notifications will land here.

offline.saveError: Could not save that change — it was reverted. Please retry.

onboarding.bannerDesc: Finish the onboarding wizard to configure your compliance workspace.
onboarding.accessRestrictedDesc: Only tenant administrators can access the onboarding wizard.
onboarding.workspaceReady: Your workspace is ready. Redirecting to dashboard...
onboarding.welcome: Welcome! Let's set up your workspace.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: This wizard will guide you through configuring your compliance platform in just a few steps.
onboarding.onboardingCompleteDesc: Your workspace has been configured. You can always update settings from the admin panel.
onboarding.setupWizardDesc: Complete these steps to configure your compliance workspace.
onboarding.companyProfileIntro: Tell us about your organization. This information helps tailor your compliance experience.
onboarding.frameworkIntro: Select the compliance frameworks you want to implement. You can add more later.
onboarding.fwIsoDesc: International information security management standard. Installs 93 controls across 4 domains.
onboarding.fwNis2Desc: EU cybersecurity directive for essential and important entities. Installs sector-specific requirements.
onboarding.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one framework to continue.
onboarding.assetIntro: Add your key information assets. These are the systems, databases, and services you need to protect.
onboarding.assetHint: You can import assets in bulk later from the Assets page.
onboarding.controlIntro: We'll install baseline controls from your selected frameworks. This creates your initial control register.
onboarding.noFrameworksSelected: No frameworks selected. Go back to the Frameworks step to select at least one.
onboarding.riskIntro: Generate a starter risk register based on your assets and selected frameworks.
onboarding.starterRiskDesc: We'll generate common information security risks based on industry best practices. You can customize, add, or remove risks later.
onboarding.teamIntro: Invite your team members. They'll receive an email invitation to join your workspace.
onboarding.teamHint: You can skip this step and invite team members later from the Admin panel.
onboarding.reviewIntro: Review your setup before completing onboarding.
onboarding.reviewNotice: Click "Complete Setup" below to finish onboarding and go to your dashboard.

installPrompt.installDesc: Add it to your home screen — works in the field, online or off.
installPrompt.a2hsAria: Add AgriSaaS to your home screen
installPrompt.a2hsDesc: Tap the Share icon, then “Add to Home Screen” to install AgriSaaS for offline field use.
